title: Spring into Alaska.
summary: Welcome to Trustees for Alaska and our spring celebration! It’s May, after all, and here in Southcentral Alaska it’s only snowing… occasionally. The post Spring into Alaska. appeared first on Trustees for Alaska .

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: May 4, 2023
summary: May 4 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a slightly lower rate of 2.03% , from the level on 04/27/2023 of 13.690 M km 2 to 13.414 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources Laboratory...
